zucchini-stuffed-with-couscous-a-healthy.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Couscous: A Healthy And Recipe
zucchini-stuffed-with-couscous-a-healthy.original_name: Calabacines rellenos de cuscús: una receta saludable y fácil

ingredients.item: 1 cda  de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)
1 taza de caldo de verduras caliente
3 cdas de queso feta desmenuzado o queso vegano rallado

instructions: Wash pumpkins and cut them by half lengthwise. With a small spoon, carefully empty his pulp with an edge of about 1 cm. Reserve some of his pulp for pilling. Put pumpkins in an oven plate, brush them with olive oil and splinter them to taste.
It purifies the oven at 180 been 3 and bakes the pumpkin halves for 15 minutes so that they will smooth slightly without losing their firmness.
In a bowl, place the cuscus and pour hot vegetable stock onto it. Cover with a clear cloth and let rest 5 minutes. Then, airea with a fork to drop the grains.
In a big frying pan, heat up a tablespoon of olive oil. Soak onion and garlic till clear. Add pumpkin pulp, pepper, carrot and tomato. Cooking for 6-8 minutes till the vegetables are tender.
Add to salted the hydrated cuscus, raisins, almonds, spices (cumin, turmeric), lemon juice, mint and parsley. Mix well and suit salt and pepper to taste.

It generously fills pucchini halves with a cuscus mixture. If you wish, sprinkle Feta cheese above. Hornea for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is golden and the pumpkins are fully cooked.
Sirve los calabacines rellenos calientes para disfutar.

zucchini-stuffed-with-shrimp-and-chicken.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Shrimp And Chicken Baked With Bechamel
zucchini-stuffed-with-shrimp-and-chicken.original_name: Calabacines rellenos de gambas y pollo al horno con bechamel

ingredients.item: 300 g de gambas grandes o langostinos

instructions: We wash pumpkins, we clear and if you wish you can remove some skin cuts throughout, this is just decorative. With a splinter or scrubbing we put out our pumpkin pulp with care to leave a little bottom and serve as a base. Let's have both.
In a frying pan with some extra virgin olive oil we polish the onion finely minced. When it starts to fall asleep, we put the pumpkins very minced, we leap, and we add the chicken into small pieces.
Once the chicken's been cooked, we add the flour and cook for a few minutes. We add milk little by little while we mix
Finally, we add pitted and scented prawns or locusts, pounding.
With this mixture we fill with pumpkins and sprinkle with grated cheese and if you wish, you can decorate with an entire lobster.
We bake about 20- 25 minutes at 180 ° C
